script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（震惊，模拟按计算器）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: How can custom store sign letters be this cheap?

script.speaker: 工厂
script.text: Direct factory supply, no middleman markup.

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: Overseas buyers never imagine this price gap between retail and source factory.

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（不敢置信反复换算）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: The same 304 stainless sign costs 10x more in my city!

script.speaker: 工厂
script.text: We process raw materials ourselves, cut all extra costs.

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: Most local sign shops earn huge hidden profits from brand owners.

title: Budget Surprise for Premium Sign
scenes: foreign customer hesitant to ask price

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（小心翼翼试探）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: Is this high-end backlit sign out of my budget?

script.speaker: 工厂
script.text: The price is far lower than your expectation.

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: Global shop owners always overestimate the cost of commercial luminous signage.

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（皱眉核对报价）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: Why waterproof outdoor signs don't charge extra fees here?

script.speaker: 工厂
script.text: Full sealing craft is our standard production step.

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: Many factories add waterproof processing as an extra paid item overseas.

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（瞪大双眼）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: Such delicate polishing craft, I thought it would cost a fortune.

script.speaker: 工厂
script.text: Fine polishing is mandatory for all export orders.

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: Premium workmanship does not equal high cost at professional signage plant.

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（反复敲击计算器）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: Even small batch custom logo signs have factory wholesale price?

script.speaker: 工厂
script.text: One piece custom and bulk orders share the same cost system.

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: Middlemen separate small orders and raise prices deliberately.

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（顾虑重重）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: I worried low price means shoddy lamp beads and thin steel.

script.speaker: 工厂
script.text: We never reduce material standards to cut prices.

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: This is why countless foreign merchants abandon local suppliers.

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（惊喜）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: Anti-rust rooftop large luminous signs are so affordable!

script.speaker: 工厂
script.text: 304 stainless steel is always in sufficient stock.

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: Chinese manufacturers break the high-price monopoly of foreign signage market.

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（困惑）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: All shops around my town use overpriced simple luminous letters.

script.speaker: 工厂
script.text: They haven't found the direct source factory yet.

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: Information difference creates the biggest profit space for distributors.

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（叹气感慨）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: I paid triple money for inferior signs in last cooperation.

script.speaker: 工厂
script.text: Most overseas buyers bear unnecessary premium every year.

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: This single video can save thousands of dollars for global store operators.

title: The Secret Behind Night Glow
scenes: close-up of sign lighting up at night

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（好奇探秘语气）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: Why do Chinese luminous signs look more textured after dark?

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: The core secret lies in lamp density and full glue sealing craft rarely disclosed by factories.

title: Why Yours Last for Years
scenes: comparing faded local sign with GLOWFORGE sign

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（疑惑不解）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: Local signs fade and dim within one year, but yours keep bright for years.

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: Most small factories save cost on waterproof glue, while we prioritize long-term durability.

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（凑近样品仔细观察）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: What technology keeps outdoor letters from rusting all year round?

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: Strict raw material screening and full edge polishing are the core of export-grade signage.

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（对着灯珠特写发问）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: Why your light is even without flickering on camera?

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: We adopt export anti-strobe lamp modules, completely different from cheap domestic lamp beads.

title: Export Standard Beats Local
scenes: comparing details of export vs local sign

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（惊叹）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: Your fine craft details beat all local sign manufacturers I contacted.

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: The unified high standard of Chinese export signage is invisible to ordinary buyers.

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（想起过往踩坑经历）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: Why many luminous signs break down once rainy season arrives?

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: Hidden waterproof loopholes are the common trick of low-cost small workshops.

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（求知欲强）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: How to distinguish high-quality luminous letters in just three seconds?

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: Professional factory reveals three identification tricks hidden from ordinary customers.

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（恍然大悟）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: No wonder international chain brands all cooperate with Chinese factories.

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: Stable consistent quality is the unspoken rule of global chain store procurement.

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（对比样品质感）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: Why does your steel surface have unique delicate texture?

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: Every polishing step strictly follows overseas commodity inspection standards.

title: Export vs Domestic: The Real Difference
scenes: two signs side by side in harsh weather

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（深度探秘提问）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: What's the essential difference between export signs and ordinary domestic ones?

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: Anti-corrosion, anti-high temperature, anti-rain performance all upgraded for complex foreign climate.

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（无奈吐槽）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: Any decent luminous sign is extremely expensive in my country.

script.speaker: 工厂
script.text: At our source factory, premium texture is the basic matching standard.

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: The overseas signage market has serious price bubbles for a long time.

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（惊喜错愕）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: You support free customization of any LOGO and store style?

script.speaker: 工厂
script.text: We provide design customization service for global commercial scenarios.

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: Most overseas sign companies charge extra for custom design services.

title: Years of Overcharging Exposed
scenes: customer showing photos of previous bad signs

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（满心委屈）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: I was overcharged and supplied rough products by local vendors for years.

script.speaker: 工厂
script.text: The overseas signage market has serious price bubbles for a long time.

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: Information asymmetry keeps loyal customers trapped in unfair pricing cycles.

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（疑惑提问）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: How can you finish customized bulk orders in such a short cycle?

script.speaker: 工厂
script.text: Complete standardized assembly line and mature export production flow.

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: Local sign makers lack the scale to match Chinese factory production efficiency.

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（意外）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: You also accept tiny single store custom orders without extra surcharge?

script.speaker: 工厂
script.text: We don't set order quantity threshold, focus on long-term stable cooperation.

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: Other suppliers reject small orders or add hidden surcharges arbitrarily.

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（对比质保政策）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: Why your global warranty period is far longer than local suppliers?

script.speaker: 工厂
script.text: We fully recognize the quality of our own materials and craft technology.

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: Confidence in product quality allows us to offer superior warranty terms.

title: Mini Letters, Big Capability
scenes: mini delicate letters on reception desk

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（失落回忆）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: Local factories cannot produce such delicate mini front desk letters.

script.speaker: 工厂
script.text: China has formed a complete mature industrial chain of luminous signage export.

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（好奇）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: What attracts numerous foreign brands to place orders with your factory?

script.speaker: 工厂
script.text: Stable quality, transparent factory price and one-stop export service.

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: Reliability and transparency make Chinese manufacturers trusted global partners.

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（核算批量订单）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: The wholesale discount for large orders is more sincere than I expected.

script.speaker: 工厂
script.text: As direct manufacturer, we abandon excessive profit margins to win global partners.

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: Direct factory pricing model creates a win-win for both manufacturer and buyer.

title: Chinese Manufacturing Redefines Standards
scenes: montage of global stores using GLOWFORGE signs

script.speaker: scene
script.text: 老外（彻底改观）

script.speaker: 老外
script.text: This cooperation completely changes my cognition of commercial signage.

script.speaker: 旁白
script.text: Chinese manufacturing is reshaping the global commercial display industry standard.
